chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

parts.text: 286 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِنِّي لَأَحْلِقُ فِي

text: كُلِّ جُمُعَةٍ فِيمَا بَيْنَ اَلطَّلْيَةِ إِلَى اَلطَّلْيَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.286 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"I indeed shave (the head) every Jumu’ah, from one washing to the next."
